output.title: Security Deposit Demand Letter: How to Get Your Refund When Your Landlord Won't Pay
output.meta_description: Learn how to write a security deposit demand letter and get your refund fast. Free template included when your landlord won't return your deposit.
content_outline: Introduction: How to Get Your Security Deposit Back
What Is a Security Deposit Demand Letter?
Why You Need a Demand Letter for Security Deposit Disputes
How to Write a Security Deposit Letter to Your Landlord
Security Deposit Return Letter vs. Security Deposit Refund Letter
State-by-State Deadlines: When Landlords Must Pay
What to Do If Your Landlord Ignores Your Letter to Landlord About Security Deposit
How DepositBack Automates Your Demand Letter
key_points: A formal security deposit demand letter is often legally required before you can sue your landlord in small claims court
Most states give landlords 14 to 60 days to return a deposit or provide an itemized deduction list
Including move-out photos, your forwarding address, and state law citations strengthens your demand letter for security deposit recovery
Using a professionally written security deposit demand letter template increases response rates and shows you understand your tenant rights
DepositBack generates state-specific security deposit letters to landlords in minutes, helping renters recover thousands in wrongfully withheld deposits
output.cta: Don't let your landlord keep what's yours. Create your state-specific security deposit demand letter in minutes with DepositBack and take the first step toward recovering your full refund.
output.target_audience: US renters who have recently moved out and are waiting for a security deposit return, or whose landlord has wrongfully withheld all or part of their deposit refund
